tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
control-plane
 no service-policy input PM_COPP
exit
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_COMPROMISED
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
exit
class-map match-any CM_ICMP_FROM_COMP
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_COMPROMISED
exit
policy-map PM_INGRESS_ICMP_LIMIT
 class CM_ICMP_FROM_COMP
  police 8000 1500 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 no shutdown
 service-policy input PM_INGRESS_ICMP_LIMIT
exit
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#control-plane
Switch(config-cp)# no service-policy input PM_COPP
Switch(config-cp)#exit
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_COMPROMISED
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)#exit
Switch(config)#class-map match-any CM_ICMP_FROM_COMP
Switch(config-cmap)# match access-group name ICMP_FROM_COMPROMISED
Switch(config-cmap)#exit
Switch(config)#policy-map PM_INGRESS_ICMP_LIMIT
Switch(config-pmap)# class CM_ICMP_FROM_COMP
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 8000 1500 conform-action transmit exceed-actio$00 1500 conform-action transmit exceed-action          drop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)#exit
Switch(config-pmap-c)#interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Switch(config-if)# no shutdown
Switch(config-if)# service-policy input PM_INGRESS_ICMP_LIMIT
Switch(config-if)#exit
Switch(config)#write memory
                ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch(config)#
Switch(config)#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"end
write memory
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
show access-lists"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
 GigabitEthernet0/1 

  Service-policy input: PM_INGRESS_ICMP_LIMIT

    Class-map: CM_ICMP_FROM_COMP (match-any)  
      0 packets, 0 bytes
      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps
      Match: access-group name ICMP_FROM_COMPROMISED
        0 packets, 0 bytes
        5 minute rate 0 bps
      police:
          cir 8000 bps, bc 1500 bytes
        conformed 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          transmit 
        exceeded 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          drop 
        conformed 0000 bps, exceeded 0000 bps

    Class-map: class-default (match-any)  
      0 packets, 0 bytes
      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps
      Match: any 
Switch#
Switch#
